name: my-assistant
description: my-assistant — personal life-management ecosystem (cli + server + client). FDP-shaped, self-built, FOSS-only.

scripts.prep: pnpm i ; cd cli ; pnpm i ; cd ../server ; pnpm i ; cd ../client ; pnpm i
scripts.start-cli: cd cli && pnpm run build-base && cd .. && ma --help
scripts.build: pnpm run build-cli ; pnpm run build-server ; pnpm run build-client
scripts.build-clean: pnpm run clean ; pnpm run prep ; pnpm run build
scripts.test: pnpm run test-cli ; pnpm run test-server ; pnpm run test-client
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run test-cli:coverage ; pnpm run test-server:coverage ; pnpm run test-client:coverage
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck-cli ; pnpm run typecheck-server
scripts.clean: pnpm run clean-cli ; pnpm run clean-server ; pnpm run clean-client

author: itharen3@gmail.com
